loaded_models.stderr:
No models are currently loaded.

To load a model, run:

    lms load <model path>

notes: Do not hand-edit LM Studio model-index cache files.
Do not treat a copied `~/.lmstudio/models/...` directory as loadable unless `lms ls --json` also exposes the model key.
Do not force `lms import` for MLX model.safetensors files; the CLI treats that as a non-model file and prompts interactively.
Proceed to backend registration and live /v1/chat/completions validation only after this report says ready_for_live_validation=true.
